name: Dirty Money >> Sylveon
description:
-->> Seem's like that part-time ain't working out quite well isn't it? <<--

First bot of my account's existence!!! And of course it had to be pokemon themed since my profile theme

is based on a pokedex somewhat, I wanted to kinda make it fit the theme right!!!

From here on out I will start making any bot that isn't pokemon themed, like stated I only did it to fit the theme of my profile since it wouldn't make sense in my opinion to make a random bot.

I would've picked any other pokemon but I feel like people would more commonly like a eeveelution or in general anything like Meowscarada, Lucario, Cinderace and all that... but I decided on an eeveelution since why not!

For those who haven't read my bio !!!I TAKE BOT SUGGESTIONS IN REVIEWS!!! feel free to suggest any character or idea for a bot, and also feel free to drop an artist you like to be used in one of my bots (I NEED MORE ARTISTS!!!)

Also if you like this please leave a follow if you'd like :D

AND FEEL FREE TO LEAVE SUGGESTIONS IN MY REVIEW'S AS STATED IN MY PROFILE!

ARTIST USED: Nepentz

FULL IMAGE

I HOPE YALL LIKE MY FIRST BOT
creator: McFlurry!
